name: Strawberry-Peach Crisp
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees.
2. Mix sliced strawberries, peaches, lemon juice, sugar, whole-wheat flour, cinnamon, and nutmeg in an 8-inch square baking dish.
3. Make the topping by tossing together whole-wheat flour, light brown sugar, melted butter, and cinnamon. Sprinkle over the filling.
4. Bake for 35 minutes, or until the topping is golden brown and crisp. Serve with ice cream or whipped cream.
